# HR Employee First Name, Last Name

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:34a84644550eaa249878eab844a3182f03592ba30d29b27b441edc886821d79f
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows you to add firstname and lastname in employee form,
and concatenate both in name field.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

On the employee form view you will have 2 separate fields, one for
Firstname, second for Lastname. At least one of them is required.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/hr/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/hr/issues/new?body=module:%20hr_employee_firstname%0Aversion:%2018.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

modules.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_firstname.models.base_config_settings
documentation: Copyright 2015 Antiun Ingenieria S.L. - Antonio Espinosa

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_firstname.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._get_names_order
documentation:
Get names order configuration from system parameters.
You can override this method to read configuration from language,
country, company or other

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_firstname.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._get_whitespace_cleaned_name
documentation:
Remove redundant whitespace from {param}`name`.

Removes leading, trailing and duplicated whitespace.

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_firstname.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._get_inverse_name
documentation:
Compute the inverted name.

This method can be easily overriden by other submodules.
You can also override this method to change the order of name's
attributes

When this method is called, {attr}`~.name` already has unified and
trimmed whitespace.

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_firstname.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._inverse_name
documentation: Try to revert the effect of {meth}`._compute_name`.

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_firstname.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._install_employee_firstname
documentation:
Save names correctly in the database.

Before installing the module, field `name` contains all full names.
When installing it, this method parses those names and saves them
correctly into the database. This can be called later too if needed.

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_firstname.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._check_name
documentation: Ensure at least one name is set.
